mnemonics: Zero-One Matrix: Zeroes are Nothing, Ones are Everything
Directed Graph: Dogs Run In Straight Lines
Partial Order: Pets Are Loving Individuals Really Often
Equivalence Relation: Everyone Quaintly Undergoes Equal Relationships
keyPoints: A relation represented as a zero-one matrix is reflexive if it contains 1's on the diagonal
A relation represented as a directed graph is transitive if there's a path from a to c for any a and c where there's a path from a to b and a path from b to c
A partial order is reflexive, transitive, and antisymmetric
An equivalence relation is reflexive, symmetric, and transitive
A partition of a set is a collection of non-empty subsets that are pairwise disjoint
